summary: UI Polish Update testing completed. All pages load correctly with improved visibility, card effects, and smooth page transitions (framer-motion). Dashboard, Clientes, Ativacoes, Chips, Linhas, and Portal pages all functional. Minor React warning on Chips/Linhas pages (Maximum update depth exceeded) - non-blocking.

console_warnings.warning: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component calls setState inside useEffect
console_warnings.impact: Non-blocking - pages still load and function correctly
console_warnings.note: Warning appears during navigation but does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with 5 stat cards (Total de Clientes, Total de Chips, Linhas Ativas, Planos, Ofertas Ativas)
Dashboard shows Status dos Chips section with Disponiveis/Ativados/Bloqueados
Dashboard shows Status das Linhas section with Ativas/Pendentes/Bloqueadas
Dashboard shows Atividade Recente section with activity log
Sidebar navigation links all present and clickable
Page transitions work smoothly with framer-motion fade-in animation
Clientes page loads with data table showing Nome, Tipo, Documento, Telefone, Dados, Status, Acoes
Clientes table text visibility improved (zinc-200 for td, zinc-300 for th)
Ativacoes page loads with 'Ativar por QR Code' button visible
Chips page loads with table and badge styles (badge-available, badge-active)
Linhas page loads with table and status badges
Portal login page at /portal loads correctly
Portal dashboard at /portal/dashboard loads after login
Badge styles render correctly: badge-active (emerald), badge-blocked (red), badge-pending (amber), badge-available (blue)
Card hover effects defined in CSS (hover:border-zinc-600, hover:-translate-y-0.5)
Stat cards have hover effect with color change on value (stat-card:hover .stat-value text-blue-400)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warning on Chips/Linhas pages - likely related to useCallback/useEffect dependency array with statusFilter state
critical_code_review_comments: PageTransition component correctly uses framer-motion with key={location.pathname} for route-based re-animation
CSS improvements: sidebar-link text upgraded to zinc-300, data-table td to zinc-200, stat-label to zinc-300
Card hover effects properly implemented with transition-all duration-300 ease-out
Badge styles have consistent design with border and background opacity
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI polish update verified. All pages load correctly with improved text visibility (zinc-300/zinc-200 instead of zinc-400/zinc-500), card hover effects, and smooth page transitions via framer-motion. Console warning on Chips/Linhas pages is non-blocking. Portal login/dashboard working. All badge styles (active, blocked, pending, available, inactive) render correctly.

mocked_apis_list: Ta Telecom API (may be mocked in preview)
Asaas API (may be mocked in preview)

ui_polish_verified.card_effects: Hover effects with border-zinc-600, -translate-y-0.5, scale-[0.98] on active
ui_polish_verified.page_transitions: Smooth fade-in with framer-motion (opacity 0->1, y 12->0, 0.3s ease-out)
ui_polish_verified.badge_styles: All badge variants render correctly with proper colors and borders
ui_polish_verified.sidebar_navigation: All links functional with active state highlighting
